utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan: it includes health_coverage (with costs for physical and mental health and a total), property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs and optional add-ons with costs, plus a total_cost_example), travel_coverage (plan, cost, benefits), additional_services (with a health add-on including cost), and total_budget (monthly and annual breakdowns). Each item has the required costs and relevant details, matching the required fields.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan: Health coverage selects LifeFirst Standard Plan for both physical and mental health. Property core plan selects HomeFirst Standard Coverage. Optional property services example selects Smart Home Integration and Emergency Response Service. Travel coverage selects TravelFirst Standard Plan. Additional services include Telemedicine Services. Using the ground-truth ratings, map each named item to its rating.
